differentials.name: tender swollen erythematous breast
differentials.raw: tender swollen erythematous breast (DDx: inflammatory ca.)

differentials.name: acute onset of a distinct firm / hard tender painful mass sparing subareolar region; nipple retraction
differentials.raw: acute onset of a distinct firm / hard tender painful mass sparing subareolar region; nipple retraction

context: Acute Mastitis =  infection of the breast with primary ascending canalicular + secondary interstitial spread Cause:  mammary duct obstruction / ectasia; cellulitis; immunocompromised state; nipple injury Pathogen:  S. aureus (most commonly) Histo:  acute + chronic inflammatory infiltration, fibrosis, occasional multinucleated giant cells Age:     any; most commonly in lactating woman √  diffuse increased density √  diffuse skin thickening √  swelling of breast √  enlarged axillary lymph nodes √  rapid resolution under antibiotic therapy US: √  increased echogenicity in fat lobules √  hypoechoi
